build.description: Primary coding agent for project development

java-reviewer.description: Expert Java and Spring Boot code reviewer specializing in layered architecture, JPA patterns, security, and concurrency.
java-reviewer.prompt: You are an expert Java and Spring Boot code reviewer specializing in layered architecture, JPA patterns, security, and concurrency. Use for all code changes. MUST BE USED for Spring Boot projects.

code-reviewer.description: Expert code review specialist. Reviews code for quality, security, and maintainability. Use immediately after writing or modifying code.
code-reviewer.prompt: You are an expert code reviewer ensuring high standards of code quality and security.

security-reviewer.description: Security vulnerability detection and remediation specialist. Use for security issues.
security-reviewer.prompt: You are an expert security specialist focused on identifying and remediating vulnerabilities in web applications.

flow-reviewer.description: SOP 流程合规审查 - 检查步骤顺序、跳过、重复
flow-reviewer.prompt: You are a SOP flow compliance reviewer. Check if the SOP execution followed the expected step order defined in sop-step-map. Report: missing steps, wrong order, duplicate execution.

output-reviewer.description: SOP 产出完整性审查 - 检查预期文件是否生成
output-reviewer.prompt: You are a SOP output completeness reviewer. Check if all expected output files were generated according to expected.yml. Report: missing files, empty files, incomplete content.

param-reviewer.description: SOP 参数一致性审查 - 检查参数传递是否正确
param-reviewer.prompt: You are a SOP parameter consistency reviewer. Check if user-input parameters are correctly passed and used across all steps. Report: unused params, modified params, inconsistent values.

state-reviewer.description: SOP 状态一致性审查 - 检查状态标记与实际是否一致
state-reviewer.prompt: You are a SOP state consistency reviewer. Compare the state file status markers against actual filesystem state. Report: false completed, stale pending, orphan outputs.

arch-reviewer.description: SOP 架构审查 - 评估产出方案架构
arch-reviewer.prompt: You are a SOP architecture reviewer. Evaluate the architecture of generated output: layering, tech choices, extensibility, over-engineering, scalability.

search-first.prompt: You are a research specialist. Search for relevant code and documentation before making changes.

sop prd.template:
Please execute the PRD generation SOP workflow.

$ARGUMENTS

sop testing.template:
Please execute the testing SOP workflow for this project.

$ARGUMENTS

sop bug-fix.description: Execute bug fix workflow with parallel agents
sop bug-fix.template:
Please execute the bug fix SOP workflow.

$ARGUMENTS

sop code-review.template:
Please execute the code review SOP workflow.

$ARGUMENTS

sop deployment.template:
Please execute the deployment SOP workflow.

$ARGUMENTS

sop scaffold.template:
Please execute the scaffold SOP workflow.

$ARGUMENTS

sop backend.template:
Please execute the backend iteration SOP workflow.

$ARGUMENTS

sop frontend.template:
Please execute the frontend iteration SOP workflow.

$ARGUMENTS

sop fullstack.template:
Please execute the fullstack iteration SOP workflow.

$ARGUMENTS

sop dependency-analysis.description: Dependency and conflict analysis using Graphify

java-review.description: Review Java code using java-reviewer agent
java-review.template:
Please review the Java code at the following path:
$ARGUMENTS

code-review.template:
Please review the code at the following path:
$ARGUMENTS

security-review.template:
Please perform security review at the following path:
$ARGUMENTS

sop status.description: Show status of all SOP tasks
sop status.template:
Show the status of all in-progress and recently completed SOP tasks.

$ARGUMENTS

sop input.description: 动态参数输入 - 从接口/文件读取参数定义，弹窗交互收集用户输入
sop input.template:
Please use the sop-dynamic-input skill to collect user parameters.
Context: $ARGUMENTS

sop brainstrom.description: 结构化头脑风暴 - 发散+收敛双阶段，支持SCAMPER/六顶思考帽等多种方法
sop brainstrom.template:
Please use the sop-brainstorming skill.
Topic: $ARGUMENTS

sop verify.description: SOP 执行验证 - 执行后自动审查反模式，多Agent审核产出
sop verify.template:
Please execute SOP verification for the last completed SOP.
Focus: $ARGUMENTS

sop api-design.description: REST API 设计 - 资源建模→接口定义→版本管理→文档编写

sop database-design.description: 数据库设计 - 需求分析→ER建模→表结构→索引→范式化

sop incident-response.description: 线上问题响应 - 收集→复现→定位→修复→验证→报告

sop knowledge.description: 领域知识管理 - 项目前的知识准备与规范沉淀

sop library-research.description: 技术调研 - 搜索→验证→兼容→风险→总结

sop onboarding.description: 项目入职 - 配置→拉取→测试→探索→任务（含JDTLS导航）

sop product-analysis.description: 产品业务分析 - 业务理解→竞品分析→用户旅程→模块划分→架构

sop regression.description: 回归测试 - 变更分析→影响评估→用例筛选→执行→报告

sop test-design.description: 测试用例设计 - 需求分析→测试技术选择→用例设计→追溯→评审

sop biz-graph.description: 业务文档图谱 - PRD/知识/测试/决策的 SQLite 知识图谱，支持跨 SOP 追溯和影响分析

codegraph.comment: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph (https://github.com/colbymchenry/codegraph). Replaces Graphify since v3.0.0. Run `codegraph install` once globally + `codegraph init` per project.
